scripts.check: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process'),fs=require('fs');let bad=0;for(const f of fs.readdirSync('js').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.js'))){try{execSync('node --check js/'+f,{stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){bad++;console.error('SYNTAX ERROR in js/'+f+':\n'+e.stderr.toString())}}process.exit(bad?1:(console.log('All JS files OK'),0))"
